theme: Insert parts before their access corridors seal
title: Sealed Corridors: The Assembly Insertion Order
strategies: index-order install: attempt parts in the order they were listed, skipping any whose footprint or corridor is already occupied (the checker's own weak reference)
value-first greedy: install the most valuable part first, then the next, with no lookahead into which corridors that seals for parts not yet installed

must-precede digraph + value-weighted cycle breaking: for every pair (u,v) where u's footprint would intersect v's corridor, add a 'v before u' constraint; repeatedly delete the cheapest part in any remaining cycle until the constraint graph is acyclic, then topologically sort the survivors
exact / near-exact feedback-vertex-set search (branch-and-bound or ILP over the must-precede digraph) for the true maximum-value acyclic subset, beyond the polynomial heuristic
